# Time Off and Leave Policy (Fixture)

## Overview

Short **PTO** excerpt for tests. Applies to full-time employees at Acme Payments.

---

## Paid Time Off (PTO)

### Accrual

- **15 days** PTO per year, accrued monthly from start date

### Usage

Vacation, personal time, short illness. New hires: PTO use after **90 days**.

---

## Sick Leave

At least **5 days** paid sick leave per year where required by law.

---

## Carryover

Up to **5** unused PTO days carry over; excess is forfeited.

---

## Approval

Submit via HR system; **3+** consecutive days need **2 weeks** notice when possible.

---

Last updated: 2025-02-10 (fixture)
